headline: Q1 Earnings Highlights: Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) Vs The Rest Of The Regional Banks Stocks
summary: As the Q1 earnings season wraps, let’s dig into this quarter’s best and worst performers in the regional banks industry, including Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) and its peers.

headline: Baird Maintains Outperform on Fifth Third Bancorp, Raises Price Target to $58
summary: Baird  analyst David George   maintains Fifth Third Bancorp (NASDAQ:FITB) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $56 to $58.
